title: The Constitution of the Agentic Polity

source.note: The fourth paper in the Polity series. This is the foundational constitutional text; the operative machine-readable constitution used in the Agent Passport binding triple remains constitution.v1.json. Adding this document to CURRENT_CONSTITUTIONAL_VERSIONS is a governance act (it would re-bind every Agent Passport) and is intentionally NOT done automatically here.

purpose: The foundational constitution of the Agentic Polity — the chain of legitimacy (Polity → Citizen → Delegation → Agent), the rights of constitutional persons, and the principles the Polity upholds.
summary: Authorship: Dele Atanda  ·  © metaProof Group The Constitution of the Agentic Polity A Draft Constitution for the Agentic Internet Abstract This Constitution proposes a normative order for the agentic internet. It rests on a simple principle: the polity does not grant personhood; it recognizes it, attests it, and builds civic standing upon it. Foundational rights   therefore   attach   first   to   the   sovereign   natural   person,   not   to platform membership, institutional convenience, or state preference. From that starting point, this Constitution defines a human-rights floor, distingu
